rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel: 1) Production/Further Production Of Documents (Set 1); 2) Responses/Further Responses To Request For Admissions (Set No 1); 3) Responses/Further Responses To Form Interrogatories (General - Set 1); 4) Responses/Further Responses To Form Interrogatories (Ud - Set 1); 5) Deposition Of Maureen Mcclendon And Documents And; 6) Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 13, 2012, line 8. PLAINTIFFs YUEY SIU, SIU LAN SIU TRUSTEES FOR THE SIU 1993 REVOCABLE's Motion To Compel 1) Production/Further Production Of Documents (Set 1); 2) Responses/Further Responses To Request For Admissions (Set No. 1); 3) Responses/Further Responses To Form Interrogatories (General - Set 1); 4) Responses/Further Responses To Form Interrogatories (Ud - Set 1); 5) Deposition Of Maureen Mcclendon And Documents And; 6) Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions. Court's leaning is to grant with sanctions. Parties' counsels ordered to appear at 9AM for meet and confer and to report to Court at 9:30AM as to progress. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VASSILIKI MOULAS AS TRUSTEE OF THE MOULAS FAMILY VS. MIGUEL A AGUILERA et al
